documents.title: UI Guardrails Report: Design-System Adherence Inspection

documents.title: Composable Page Kinds: content_page Shell, Astryx QueryTable, Shared Request State

documents.title: UI Catalog Dev Mode: Live ui/ Iteration Without Binary Rebuilds
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan adding envs.local.ui_catalog: generation materializes react/scenery-ui from a live @scenery/ui source directory instead of the binary embed, and scenery up watches that directory and re-syncs clients in place with staged TypeScript verification, embed fallback for absent paths, and hard errors for implausible ones — catalog edits reach the browser via Vite HMR with no Go rebuild or app restart.

documents.title: Named Environments: envs Config, Per-Env Domain/Serve/Deploy, Dotenv Layering
documents.summary: Active ExecPlan replacing the implicit dev/deploy config split with named environments: an envs map carrying per-env domain, frontend serve modes, routing details, and env-scoped deploy targets; per-env dotenv layering with a reserved local default env; always-injected SCENERY_ENV; env-derived secret strictness; and removal of the localhost-to-production redirect fallback. Hard cutover of dev.routing.* and top-level deploy.*.

documents.title: Declarative Table Pages: CRUD List Contract, Binary-Owned UI Catalog, Verified React Generation
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan shipping explicit CRUD list filter/sort capabilities and query-bound cursor pagination, table_page and generic sidebar/detail split_page expansion, react_component slots with raw request state and QueryState guidance, the binary-owned reusable UI catalog, generated React adapters and neutral routes, stale catalog-file retirement, and fail-closed checksummed native tsgo verification.

documents.title: Caddy-First Production Frontend Deployments

documents.title: Runtime Infrastructure Consolidation and CLI Logic Extraction

Plan 0117 later amended the host join to <branch>-<domain> and added exposure/serve-mode config.

documents.title: SSH Source-Sync Deployment

documents.title: Supervised Agent Lifecycle

documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan for the first devdash store-slimming slice: app_sessions no longer duplicate full app-model Metadata/APIEncoding, large app-model blobs are content-addressed, detail paths hydrate refs, and measurement-backed budget tests cover migration and pruning.

documents.title: Scenery Storage
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan that made storage a Scenery-owned beta capability with scenery.sh/storage, shared ZeroFS-backed storage cells, managed ZeroFS process/Web UI attach/reuse, session-local storage proxy, storage CLI/inspect lease surfaces, reserved HTTP storage routes, generated TypeScript browser helpers, docs, schemas, self-harness proof, and an ONLV migration proof.

documents.title: Devdash Control-Plane Store Slimming
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan that made devdash.json a compact single-writer control-plane store: compact app/session records, byte budget enforcement, app-model sidecar blobs, Victoria-only trace/report-log history, and agent-dashboard-owned global store writes are implemented.

documents.title: Agent Dev Safety Hardening
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan for agent-dev hardening around ownership fingerprints, cleanup, explicit sessions, legacy escape hatches, and parallel validation.

documents.title: Agent Runtime Operational Hardening
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan for DB-aware prune, non-destructive restart, fingerprint-verified cleanup, single-owner runtime diagnosis, visible Victoria self-healing, legacy proxy removal, and Scenery-owned parallel validation.

documents.title: Test Suite Speed and Stability
documents.summary: Completed historical test-speed ExecPlan that preserves the full repository test surface and added content-addressed linked binaries for explicit fresh runs; current cached-by-default validation policy lives in docs/local-contract.md.

documents.title: Harness Self Agent Oracle
documents.summary: Completed historical ExecPlan for making self-harness a machine-readable development oracle with full tests, recommendations, timing budgets, schema validation, context pack, and drift checks; current cached-by-default validation policy lives in docs/local-contract.md.

documents.title: Remove Objectstore Functionality
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan for removing the beta data/objectstore feature surface without compatibility aliases or dormant code paths.

documents.title: Structured Dev Events and Console
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan for a structured source-aware dev event spine, log filters, observing-only terminal console, and error summaries over the same stream.

documents.title: Dev Event Backend Cutover and Parity
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan for VictoriaLogs dev-event cutover and JSON-backed dashboard/session metadata parity; current trace summaries, trace events, and report log events are Victoria-backed per ExecPlan 0076.

documents.title: Frozen Toolchain Manifest and Managed Tool Store
documents.owner: scenery runtime / release tooling / agent DX
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan for the singular frozen toolchain manifest, managed tool store, toolchain CLI, and strict removal of implicit system PATH resolution for Scenery-managed tools.

documents.title: scenery Doctor Command
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan for a fast, read-only doctor command that reports host readiness, resources, version metadata, dependency checks, and app-sensitive diagnostics.

documents.title: Remove Legacy Agent Transport
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan for removing obsolete agent transport from config, routing, dashboard, tests, docs, and self-harness checks.

documents.title: Database Lifecycle Split
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan that split database apply, seed, and setup from generated SQLC artifacts, added fail-closed seed safety and setup fingerprinting, and completed ONLV migration through the Postgres-only platform acceptance.

documents.title: Split Local Development From Headless Runtime
documents.summary: Completed historical ExecPlan for splitting development supervisor behavior from headless runtime execution; the old headless CLI path was later removed and scenery up is the current local runtime path.

documents.title: scenery v0 Release Readiness
documents.summary: Completed historical ExecPlan for hardening a narrow production-ready v0 contract; current command contract lives in docs/local-contract.md.

documents.title: Victoria Observability Sidecars
documents.summary: Completed historical ExecPlan for supervising local VictoriaMetrics, VictoriaLogs, and VictoriaTraces sidecars as the local observability substrate.

documents.title: Active Plans
documents.summary: Current plans that should inform agent decisions, using permanent historical IDs and links mirrored in docs/knowledge.json; plans with shipped outcomes are pruned to the completed index while explicit open acceptance, measurement, validation, and implementation work remains active.

documents.title: Completed Plans
documents.summary: Completed milestones and shipped behavior, including the Astryx-native UI catalog, generated workbench table pages with Micro work-orders parity, Google connections, Symphony hardening, local storage, local path routing, shared Victoria visibility, the database lifecycle split, portable snapshots, single-current specification and identity work, and earlier audited retirements.

documents.title: Standard Auth Production Migration Runbook
documents.summary: Operator checklist and Postgres SQL template for preserving existing app-owned auth data while moving to scenery standard auth tables and the canonical scenery_refresh cookie.

documents.title: Tech Debt
documents.summary: Known cleanup and follow-up work with a linked table of contents, detached route and frontend-asset readiness marked resolved, and deeper browser harness fixture-backed mutation coverage still open.
